name: NWPX Infrastructure, Inc.
summary: NWPX Infrastructure, Inc. is a manufacturer of infrastructure products serving housing and commercial construction markets. The company produces physical infrastructure products, with exposure to raw material pricing, production capacity, and order-based demand cycles. It operates manufacturing facilities and pursues growth through internal initiatives and acquisitions. Specific product lines are not detailed in the provided excerpt.
